error.segment_alignment_range_hint: Confirm that the window unit is us and that start/end times are within the current waveform range.
error.segment_alignment_short: One or more wave windows have too few valid points for alignment.
error.segment_alignment_window_hint: Confirm that the window unit is us and that incident, reflected, and transmitted windows all cover enough data points.
dialog.error.title: Error

Time column is not strictly increasing.
_messages.Incident pulse detection confidence is l: Incident pulse detection confidence is low.
_messages.Reflected pulse detection confidence is: Reflected pulse detection confidence is low.
_messages.Transmitted pulse detection confidence i: Transmitted pulse detection confidence is low.
_messages.Incident and reflected windows overlap;: Incident and reflected windows overlap; wave separation should be reviewed.
_messages.Transmitted pulse is very weak relative: Transmitted pulse is very weak relative to the incident pulse.
_messages.Aligned waves start after appreciable wa: Aligned waves start after appreciable wave amplitude; pre-wave baseline may be truncated.
_messages.Mean force balance error is in the revie: Mean force balance error is in the review band.
_messages.Mean force balance error exceeds the sel: Mean force balance error exceeds the selected failure threshold.
_messages.Calibration-only data should use wave-sp: Calibration-only data should use wave-speed metrics rather than specimen force balance as the acceptance gate.
_messages.Brittle-material force balance is in the: Brittle-material force balance is in the material-model calibration review band.
_messages.Tensile calibration force balance is in: Tensile calibration force balance is in the material/contact calibration review band.
_messages.Auto micro-alignment could not evaluate: Auto micro-alignment could not evaluate enough overlapping points; using the initial alignment.
_messages.Auto micro-alignment did not improve the: Auto micro-alignment did not improve the selected alignment objective; using the initial alignment.
_messages.Auto alignment result should be reviewed: Auto alignment result should be reviewed; selected objective error is moderate.
_messages.Auto alignment is unreliable; selected o: Auto alignment is unreliable; selected objective error is high.
_messages.Auto alignment is unreliable; transmitte: Auto alignment is unreliable; transmitted wave amplitude is too weak for stable matching.
_messages.Gauge distance is zero or unknown; autom: Gauge distance is zero or unknown; automatic alignment used the selected objective without physical propagation constraints.
_messages.Shifted wave windows do not overlap; ali: Shifted wave windows do not overlap; aligned by normalized segment starts for review.
_messages.Incident and reflected pulses may overla: Incident and reflected pulses may overlap; a single incident-bar pulse was split for review.
_messages.Incident/reflected pulses were not detec: Incident/reflected pulses were not detected; fallback windows were created.
_messages.Transmitted pulse was not detected; fall: Transmitted pulse was not detected; fallback window was created.
_messages.Dispersion correction used default Poiss: Dispersion correction used default Poisson ratio 0.30; set bar.poisson_ratio for calibrated results.

report.summary.standard_max_abs_strain_r: Standard wave max abs strain rate (s^-1)
